title: No sound from Windows desktop
safe_steps: Open Sound settings and confirm output device.
Choose Realtek Speakers/Headphones for analog speakers/headset.
Choose NVIDIA/monitor audio only when sound comes through HDMI/DisplayPort monitor.
advanced_steps: Check Device Manager for disabled devices.
do_not_do: Do not run destructive commands without approval.
Do not ask users to share passwords.
technician_notes: Confirm scope: one user, multiple users, or full site.
Record final fix into the client-specific KB.
source_basis: Integrated IT Support original support workflow
